channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.120】Visual Studio 代码 1.120
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.120 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.120 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【.NET 11 Preview 4 is now available!】.NET 11 预览版 4 现已推出！
item.description: 【Today, we are excited to announce the fourth preview release of .NET 11! This release includes improvements across the .NET Runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.NET Core, .NET MAUI, C#, Entity Framework Core, and more. Check out the linked release notes below and get started today. [cta-button align="center" text="Download .NET 11 Preview 4" url="h】今天，我们很高兴地宣布 .NET 11 的第四个预览版！此版本包括 .NET 运行时、SDK、库、ASP.NET Core、.NET MAUI、C#、Entity Framework Core 等方面的改进。查看下面链接的发行说明并立即开始。 [cta-buttonalign=“center”text=“下载.NET 11 Preview 4”url=“h”

item.title: 【Is This a Packaged Process?】这是一个打包的过程吗？
item.description: 【Sometimes you need to know whether the current process has package identity. Certain Windows features require it, and behaviors can differ—both technically and culturally. For example, classic Windows applications often store settings in the registry, whereas packaged applications typically use】有时你需要知道当前进程是否具有包标识。某些 Windows 功能需要它，并且行为在技术和文化上可能有所不同。例如，经典的 Windows 应用程序通常将设置存储在注册表中，而打包的应用程序通常使用

item.title: 【.NET and .NET Framework May 2026 servicing releases updates】.NET 和 .NET Framework 2026 年 5 月服务版本更新
item.description: 【Welcome to our combined .NET servicing updates for May 2026. Let's get into the latest release of .NET & .NET Framework, here is a quick overview of what's new in our servicing releases: Security improvements .NET and .NET Framework have been refreshed with the latest update as of May 12, 2026. This update contains security and】欢迎使用 2026 年 5 月的组合 .NET 服务更新。让我们了解最新版本的 .NET 和 .NET Framework，以下是我们服务版本中的新增功能的快速概述： 安全性改进 .NET 和 .NET Framework 已使用截至 2026 年 5 月 12 日的最新更新进行了刷新。此更新包含安全性和

item.title: 【Foundry Local 1.1: Live Transcription, Embeddings, and Responses API】Foundry Local 1.1：实时转录、嵌入和响应 API
item.description: 【Today we're announcing the 1.1.0 release of Foundry Local — Microsoft's cross-platform local AI solution that lets developers bring AI directly into their applications with no cloud dependency, no network latency, and no per-token costs. This release adds the following: Live audio tra】今天，我们宣布发布 Foundry Local 1.1.0 版本，这是 Microsoft 的跨平台本地 AI 解决方案，可让开发人员将 AI 直接引入他们的应用程序，不依赖于云，没有网络延迟，也没有每个代币的成本。此版本添加了以下内容： 现场音频传输

item.title: 【MSVC Build Tools version 14.51 (GA) now available】MSVC 构建工具版本 14.51 (GA) 现已推出
item.description: 【Microsoft C++ (MSVC) Build Tools version 14.51 is now generally available. It is the default compiler starting with Visual Studio 2026 18.6 and will receive 9 months of servicing fixes, as described in New release cadence and suppor】Microsoft C++ (MSVC) 构建工具版本 14.51 现已全面发布。它是从 Visual Studio 2026 18.6 开始的默认编译器，并将获得 9 个月的服务修复，如新版本节奏和支持中所述

item.title: 【Introducing dotnet new WinUI templates】引入 dotnet 新 WinUI 模板
item.description: 【  [caption id="attachment_1143" align="alignnone" width="1188"]】 [标题id =“attachment_1143”对齐=“alignnone”宽度=“1188”]

item.title: 【What's new in Microsoft Foundry | April 2026】Microsoft Foundry 的新增功能 | 2026 年 4 月
item.description: 【TL;DR Foundry Local (generally available, GA): Local model inference is production-ready on Windows, macOS on Apple Silicon, and Linux x64. GPT-5.5: The latest GPT-5 family model is available in Microsoft Foundry, with default quota for Tier 5 and Tier 6 subscriptions.】TL;DR Foundry Local（正式发布，GA）：本地模型推理可在 Windows、Apple Silicon 上的 macOS 和 Linux x64 上进行生产。 GPT-5.5：Microsoft Foundry 中提供了最新的 GPT-5 系列模型，具有第 5 层和第 6 层订阅的默认配额。

item.title: 【Publishing VM Applications in a Secure World】在安全环境中发布 VM 应用程序
item.description: 【Many of you who have published VM Applications may have come across a difficult conundrum regarding security. To create an application version, you must upload your application package to a Storage blob, then provide the address of that Storage blob for repl】许多发布了 VM 应用程序的人可能都遇到过有关安全性的难题。要创建应用程序版本，您必须将应用程序包上传到存储 blob，然后提供该存储 blob 的地址以供 repl

item.title: 【Additional notes on controlling which handles are inherited by Create­Process】有关控制 CreateProcess 继承哪些句柄的附加说明
item.description: 【Some time ago, I wrote about programmatically controlling which handles are inherited by new processes in Win32 by using the PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_】前段时间，我写了一篇关于使用 PROC_THREAD_ATTRIBUTE_ 以编程方式控制 Win32 中的新进程继承哪些句柄的文章
